catalog.note: Route paths and elevation profiles are simplified display traces for TRMNL rendering, not navigation data.

trail.name: Schnebly Hill Road

season.label: Mar-Nov
season.note: Can close or become rough after storms and winter weather.

trail.highlight: A rough climb from red cliffs to pine forest with constant overlook stops.

obstacle.name: Vista Switchbacks
obstacle.blurb: Tight, rocky turns that trade speed for one of Sedona's best horizon lines.
